beats.storyText: Pip is a little hedgehog. He lives in a cozy burrow. The sun is shining. Pip is happy.
The sky gets dark. Clouds cover the sun. Pip sees raindrops on the window.
Pip is scared. He does not like the rain. The thunder is loud. Pip hides under his bed.
The rain gets stronger. Water pours down. Pip's burrow starts to leak. He gets wet.
Pip is cold and shivering. He needs to find a way to stay dry. He remembers a big umbrella in the closet.
Pip uses the umbrella. He goes outside. The rain is fun. Pip splashes in puddles. He is no longer scared. The sun comes out again. Pip is happy and dry.
